<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Wire all cross-phase integration gaps identified in the v2.0 milestone audit. All implementations exist and are tested — this phase only connects them at the bot startup/runtime layer.

5 wiring gaps:
1. HealthCog not in _COG_EXTENSIONS (1-line fix)
2. FulltimeAgent.backlog and _project_state not assigned after add_project()
3. GsdAgent consumption loop (get_assignment → completion events → PM)
4. DegradedModeManager health_check not passed to CompanyRoot
5. MessageQueue not routed into notification paths

</domain>
